title: 2Is 10th anniversary
wikitext:
[]: 2I's 10th anniversary             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sat Sep 11, 2010 6:54 am On Monday, make sure you take a moment of silence to remember the 2 billion or so who were killed on September 13, 2000 during the event we call "Second Impact." This was a tragic moment in human history, and we can only hope history will not repeat itself with a "Third Impact."

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 11, 2010 7:37 am Some people say it was an "accident" but we all know or should know that the American and Japanese governments had been behind Second Impact. We don't know why though. The impact of a meteorite is clearly an attempt at covering up what really happened . I personally believe it was a scapegoat to go to war with the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by COACH » Sat Sep 11, 2010 8:49 am You're crazy. My teacher definitely told me it was a meteorite. Trust me, he talkes about it all of the time, even during math class!

[]:             Quote Post by The-Happy-Go-Lucky-Wacko » Sat Sep 11, 2010 9:01 am Eh, it won't happen. But if it does, I'll make sure to just kick back and turn into goo.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Sep 11, 2010 9:30 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Sep 11, 2010 10:01 am ....I'd tell you happened, but then father would kill you.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 11, 2010 10:30 am COACH wrote: You're crazy. My teacher definitely told me it was a meteorite. Trust me, he talks about it all of the time, even during math class!

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Sep 11, 2010 11:22 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: I have obtained leaked footage showing what was really happening during Second Impact and hired a crack team of translators to translate what was being said. Just what was that exactly? Does that look like a meteorite to you? It certainly doesn't look like any meteorite I've ever seen. It looked like some sort of light giant or something. That is what caused second impact not some meteorite.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Sat Sep 11, 2010 11:49 am Huh, my Eva DVDs arrive on the 13th, ain't that something. I get my eva DVDs on the 10 year anniversery of 2ndI.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Sep 11, 2010 12:53 pm Azathoth wrote: Clearly fake. Look at those special effects

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sat Sep 11, 2010 12:58 pm You damn treehuggers know nothing about the government.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sat Sep 11, 2010 3:21 pm bitches don't know 'bout my trip to the South Pole.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Sep 11, 2010 3:46 pm I'm thankful that I'm on the northern hemisphere and far from the coastal area.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Sep 11, 2010 5:22 pm Oz wrote: You damn treehuggers know nothing about the government.

[]: Is it because you like the color red? Or half-melted ice?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sat Sep 11, 2010 6:46 pm ran1 wrote: bitches don't know 'bout my trip to the South Pole.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Sep 11, 2010 7:52 pm ^The surfing is awesome from what I hear.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Sat Sep 11, 2010 8:49 pm Meteorite or not, it would be disrespectful of us to forget those lost on that day.

[]:             Quote Post by Darkman.exe213 » Sat Sep 11, 2010 8:52 pm Ramiel wrote: Meteorite or not, it would be disrespectful of us to forget those lost on that day.

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel » Sat Sep 11, 2010 9:06 pm Darkman.exe213 wrote: Ironic, coming from one of the beings that is trying to cause Third Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Sep 11, 2010 9:26 pm And get blasted in the back of the head? Thanks but no thanks.
summary:
[]: 2I's 10th anniversary             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Sat Sep 11, 2010 6:54 am On Monday, make sure you take a moment of silence to remember the 2 billion or so who were killed on September 13, 2000 during the event we call "Second Impact." This was a tragic moment in human history, and we can only hope history will not repeat itself with a "Third Impact."

[]:        &nbsp
